senses.gloss: to be or become strong, smart, skillful, etc. enough to do, affect, etc. a thing

examples.text: لتؤدُّنَّ الحُقوقَ إلى أَهلِها ، حتَّى يقادَ الشَّاةُ الجلحاءُ منَ الشَّاةِ القرناءِ
examples.english: the rights will be paid to those to whom they are due so much so that a hornless sheep will be retaliated for by punishing the horned sheep which broke its horns

etymology.text: Color or defect adjective from the root ق ر ن (q r n).
